headline: PGIM Appoints Brian Towers to Lead Global Insurance and Strategic Partnerships
summary: NEWARK, N.J., April 23, 2026--Towers will draw on investment expertise across PGIM to help deliver integrated investment solutions and build long-term partnerships with insurers.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on Prudential Financial, Lowers Price Target to $100
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Ryan Krueger   maintains Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $104 to $100.

headline: Prudential hits pause on new sales at Japanese subsidiary
summary: The insurer’s CFO Yanela Frias maintained that Prudential of Japan “will emerge as a stronger, more resilient business that is better positioned to serve consumers.”

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Underperform on Prudential Financial, Lowers Price Target to $87
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Michael Zaremski   maintains Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $91 to $87.
